calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-14-2012 Continued To Feb-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Allen for DAvid Stott (Petitioner).

Counsel addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to the charges for coming out to the funeral, the airline passes/expenses, billing for the Wife's services to the Estate, the Attorney's extraordinary fees, the $26,000.00 reserve, etc. The accounting petition was continued to February 28, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Allen is to submit a declaration with regard to whether hours expended towards extraordinary services meet or exceed the statutory amount.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-31-2012 Continued To Feb-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1407-1411 Valencia Street S.F.)
Off Calendar Apr-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Allen for David Stott (Executor).

Mr. Allen presented an endorsed copy of the re-appraisal and the Buyer Jafon Hakkinen was also present. The sale was confirmed at $1,030,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the petition (subject to a proposed order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Granted Per Written Order
